title: the ladder decision record + rung implementations
manager: Settle, once and in writing, which automata rungs the checkable band can honestly claim — resolving the recorded conflict between the megaspec's four rungs and the formal review's pushback. Nothing ships a pushdown or petri decidability claim before this decision record exists, because claiming decidability you don't actually have is worse than claiming none. The verdict updates the spec and scopes what this entire era is allowed to promise.
cs: decision record weighing NPDA-equivalence undecidability (rand/hooks make our PDAs nondeterministic => VPA-only pushdown?), petri = coverability/boundedness only (reachability is Ackermann), tree = finite-carrier recognizers + transducers (fsl#492); updates megaspec §3.
